title: Badly formed Alias Engine table SEGV
description:
### Describe the bug
Seen here: https://s3.amazonaws.com/clickhouse-test-reports/json.html?REF=master&sha=latest&name_0=MasterCI&name_1=BuzzHouse+%28amd_tsan%29 Easy to reproduce
cc @nauu
### How to reproduce
With `shard` and `replica` macros set, run:
```sql
SET allow_experimental_alias_table_engine = 1;
CREATE DATABASE d0 ENGINE = Replicated('/clickhouse/path/d0', '{shard}', '{replica}');
CREATE TABLE d0.t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = Alias(); --SEGV
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE d1.t1 (id INT UNSIGNED, name VARCHAR(255), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE d1.t2 (value DOUBLE, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO d1.t2 (value, description) VALUES (3.14, NULL);
key_bug_features: Creating table with Alias engine causes segmentation fault
